sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n111549" key="filotragw|do/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">φῐλο-τρᾰγῳδός</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">όν</itype>, <sense id="n111549.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">fond of tragedies,</tr_> name of a comedy by Alexis.</sense> </entryFree>
